items.title: Inside Chicago’s Obama Center
items.summary: Italian art workers announce a nationwide strike, New York’s Penn Station to feature Trump’s name, and have you heard about the “Obamalisk”?

items.title: A First Look at the Art in the New Obama Presidential Center
items.summary: With works by Idris Khan, Maya Lin, and more, the $850M campus will be a public art destination for Chicago’s South Side, if it can live up to its community.

items.title: Winning Penn Station Redesign Features Trump’s Name
items.summary: Renderings of the station redesign show the president’s name carved into a wall, raising questions and concerns.

items.title: Italian Arts Workers Announce Nationwide Strike
items.summary: A month after a historic Venice Biennale strike, groups say they will withhold their labor this Friday, June 12, in a call for better working conditions and in solidarity with Palestine.
